entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) used for food and fodder.

entities.name: 842B
entities.description: A parental maintainer line of pearl millet.

entities.name: 842A
entities.description: A male sterile line of pearl millet used as a seed parent.

entities.name: PEDIGREE SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to derive lines 842A and 842B.

entities.name: BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method involving crossing a hybrid with one of its parents.

entities.name: TIFT23D2B1
entities.description: A pearl millet line used in the backcrossing to derive 842B.

entities.name: PI185642
entities.description: A pearl millet line used in the backcrossing to derive 842A and 842B.

entities.name: TIFT23D2A1
entities.description: A pearl millet line used in the backcrossing to derive 842A.

entities.name: KANSAS STATE UNIVERSITY
entities.description: The institution where the lines were derived.

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant to produce functional pollen, found in line 842A.

entities.name: D2 GENE
entities.description: A gene responsible for dwarfing in pearl millet, carried by line 842A.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity quickly, exhibited by line 842A.

entities.name: CANDLE-SHAPED PANICLES
entities.description: A specific panicle morphology produced by line 842A.

entities.name: HHB68
entities.description: A hybrid variety of pearl millet derived from seed parent 842A.

entities.name: DWARF VARIETY
entities.description: A hybrid variety of pearl millet derived from seed parent 842A.
